page_title: List of Attack on Titan episodes/OVA
text:
This is a list of all the OVA episodes from the Attack on Titan anime.

OVA

The (OVA) episodes are special episodes that were not aired during the original season but released alongside select volumes of the manga. Before the official English airing of all OVAs in May and June of 2022, OVAs 1, 2, 4, and 5 had been officially released in English, with subs, included in the English special editions of Volumes 17 - 20.
